text: Call us for a sweet treat 😋
Has anyone ever created a list of local food trucks to be able to look at for hiring for a large party?

user.name: Food trucks in & around North Port Fl.
Food trucks in & around North Port Fl.

text: Hi everyone, is anyone available to cover our shift tomorrow at Cape Coral Hospital from 11 AM to 3 PM?

🍕 NOW HIRING – FOOD TRUCK KITCHEN ASSISTANT 🍝

Little Italy in the USA is looking for a kitchen assistant for our Italian food truck in Cape Coral / North Fort Myers.

✅ Experience in kitchen or food prep preferred
✅ Weekend availability required
✅ Fast-paced environment
✅ Daily pay by hour
✅ We will train you on all menu items

Looking for someone reliable, clean, and ready to work.

 text  239-785-5625

Good evening,

My name is Merlyn, and I’m reaching out on behalf of La Trailita Mexican Food. We are a local food business that specializes in authentic Mexican food and community events.

We would love the opportunity to become a food vendor for future events, community gatherings, or weekend opportunities. Our goal is to bring fresh, delicious food and a great experience to the community while supporting local events.

We truly enjoy being part of community environments and creating a welcoming experience for families and residents. We would be grateful if you could give us an opportunity for any upcoming vendor events. Please call or message us at 239-691-7685.

text:
Good afternoon everyone! We currently have availability and are now booking events and communities. If you’d like us to come serve dinner at your community, neighborhood, business, or event, we’d love the opportunity to work with you! 🙏❤️

We truly appreciate every opportunity and look forward to serving you all. Feel free to message us for availability and details, or just comment and I’ll reach out to you!

P.S. We can bring our food truck or do a pop-up — whatever works best for your space.

You can see more of us on Facebook at Taqueria Mil8Mil

337-967-4673 or taqueriamil8mil@gmail.com

Good afternoon everyone! We currently have availability and are now booking events and communities. If you’d like us to come serve dinner at your community, neighborhood, business, or event, we’d love the opportunity to work with you! 🙏❤️

We truly appreciate every opportunity and look forward to serving you all. Feel free to message us for availability and details, or just comment and I’ll reach out to you!

P.S. We can bring our food truck or do a pop-up like in this video — whatever works best for your space.

You can see more of us on Facebook at Taqueria Mil8Mil

337-967-4673 or taqueriamil8mil@gmail.com

text:
ISO a Breakfast Truck for Saturday from 8am-12pm in Naples ‼️
Please DM me for more info on location if interested

It’s Trivia Night at Downtown Kava tonight!
It’s hot outside… so why turn your kitchen into a sauna with extra steps? 
Let Outside the Lunchbox handle dinner while you kick back, grab a drink, and test your trivia skills with the crew at Downtown Kava.
Good food. Cold drinks. Questionable trivia confidence.
A perfect Tuesday recipe.
Come hungry. Leave smarter… maybe.
#OutsideTheLunchbox #TriviaNight #DowntownKava #FoodTruckEats #DontHeatUpTheHouse

text:
✨ Looking for a fun and unique drink vendor for your next event? 🥤💖

Be sure to book The Snazzy Soda Shop for your upcoming:
🎉 Vendor Markets
🎂 Birthday Parties
💍 Weddings
🏢 Corporate Events
🏈 School & Sports Events
☀️ Community Festivals

We serve delicious dirty sodas, lemonades, and energizing refreshers that everyone loves! 💕✨

Professional setup ✔️
Cute aesthetic ✔️
Great customer service ✔️
Amazing drinks ✔️

Dates are filling up fast, so message us today to get on our calendar! 💌🥤

📍Serving Southwest Florida
Follow us for upcoming events & menu updates!
The Snazzy Soda Shop
